title: Web Development
description: A curated database of premium learning resources to master frontend and full-stack web development.

categories.name: HTML & CSS Foundations
categories.description: Learn the structuring and styling languages of the web.

resources.name: MDN Web Docs - HTML & CSS
resources.description: The absolute gold standard for web development documentation, offering clear tutorials, interactive examples, and reference guides for HTML and CSS structure.

resources.name: Responsive Web Design Course
resources.description: Learn semantic HTML and responsive CSS layouts interactively by building dozens of real-world page layouts directly in your browser.

resources.name: CSS-Tricks Complete Layout Guides
resources.description: Unrivaled, highly visual guides outlining the complete API and practical applications of CSS Flexbox and CSS Grid.

categories.name: JavaScript & DOM Scripting
categories.description: Bring static structures to life with logical programming and dynamic interactivity.

resources.name: The Modern JavaScript Tutorial
resources.description: An incredibly detailed, textbook-quality guide starting from core programming fundamentals and extending all the way to complex asynchronous operations, promises, and browser DOM manipulation.

resources.name: The Odin Project - Full Stack JavaScript
resources.description: A fully open-source, highly respected curriculum that takes you through a rigorous project-focused learning path using git, webpack, and pure JavaScript interfaces.

categories.name: Modern Frameworks & Tools
categories.description: Build production-grade applications using modern components, styling libraries, and state engines.

resources.name: React.dev Official Documentation
resources.description: The beautifully rewritten official interactive tutorial and reference guides detailing state management, performance optimization, and custom react hooks.

resources.name: Next.js Learn Hub
resources.description: Interactive, official course covering file-system routing under the Next.js App Router, Server Components, data fetching, caching, and server actions.

resources.name: Frontend Masters Web Tracks
resources.description: Extremely high-quality, professional video courses taught by actual industry leaders, covering advanced CSS, deep-dive JS performance, compiler theory, and systems engineering.
